title: BC Wildfire Service urges caution as fake wildfire images surface online

title: Meta to start capturing employee mouse movements, keystrokes for AI training data
description: NEW YORK — Meta META.O is installing new tracking software on US-based employees’ computers to capture mouse movements, clicks and keystrokes for use in training its artificial intelligence models, part of a broad initiative to build AI agents that can perform work tasks autonomously, the company told staffers in internal memos seen by Reuters.
